get.summary: ListUsers returns a paginated list of users. Admin/super_admin only.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return. Default 20.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results.

post.summary:
CreateUser creates a new user. Admin/super_admin only.
Self-registration is disabled.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
CreateUserRequest is the request for CreateUser.
Self-registration is disabled; only admins can create users.

get.summary: ListMyFavorites returns the current user's favorited books.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results.

get.summary: ListMyFeedback returns the current user's feedback history.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results.

get.summary: GetUser returns a single user by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the user to retrieve.

delete.summary: DeleteUser removes a user permanently. Admin only.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete.

patch.summary: UpdateUser updates an existing user. Admin only.

parameters.name: user.id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

updateTime.description: When the user was last updated.

updateMask.description: The fields to update. Supported: username, email, role, password.

password.description: New password (only used when update_mask includes "password").

UserServiceUpdateUserBody.description: UpdateUserRequest is the request for UpdateUser.

bookmgrV1FavoriteBook.description: FavoriteBook represents a user's favorite book entry.

@type.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message. This string must contain at least
one "/" character. The last segment of the URL's path must represent
the fully qualified name of the type (as in
`path/google.protobuf.Duration`). The name should be in a canonical form
(e.g., leading "." is not accepted).

In practice, teams usually precompile into the binary all types that they
expect it to use in the context of Any. However, for URLs which use the
scheme `http`, `https`, or no scheme, one can optionally set up a type
server that maps type URLs to message definitions as follows:

* If no scheme is provided, `https` is assumed.
* An HTTP GET on the URL must yield a [google.protobuf.Type][]
  value in binary format, or produce an error.
* Applications are allowed to cache lookup results based on the
  URL, or have them precompiled into a binary to avoid any
  lookup. Therefore, binary compatibility needs to be preserved
  on changes to types. (Use versioned type names to manage
  breaking changes.)

Note: this functionality is not currently available in the official
protobuf release, and it is not used for type URLs beginning with
type.googleapis.com. As of May 2023, there are no widely used type server
implementations and no plans to implement one.

Schemes other than `http`, `https` (or the empty scheme) might be
used with implementation specific semantics.

id.description: The unique identifier of the book.

description.description: A brief description of the book.

coreGoal.description: The core adaptation goal of the book.

cognitiveLevel.description: The cognitive adaptation level: light/moderate/severe (轻度/中度/重度).

coverImageUrl.description: URL to the book's cover image.

uploaderId.description: The ID of the user who uploaded/created this book.

updateTime.description: When the book was last updated.

v1BookFeedback.description: BookFeedback represents a user's feedback on a book.

username.description: The username for the new user.

role.description: The role for the new user (super_admin/admin/teacher/parent).

password.description: Initial password. If empty, a random 12-char password is generated.

v1CreateUserRequest.description:
CreateUserRequest is the request for CreateUser.
Self-registration is disabled; only admins can create users.

user.description: The newly created user (password_hash is not included).

generatedPassword.description:
The initial password (only set if auto-generated).
Admin must communicate this to the user.

v1CreateUserResponse.description: CreateUserResponse is the response for CreateUser.

v1DeleteUserResponse.description: DeleteUserResponse is the response for DeleteUser.

v1Dimension.description: Dimension represents a category dimension for picturebooks.

v1GetUserResponse.description: GetUserResponse is the response for GetUser.

v1ListMyFavoritesResponse.description: ListMyFavoritesResponse is the response for ListMyFavorites.

v1ListMyFeedbackResponse.description: ListMyFeedbackResponse is the response for ListMyFeedback.

nextPageToken.description: Token for the next page. Empty if no more results.

v1ListUsersResponse.description: ListUsersResponse is the response for ListUsers.

v1Role.description:
Role represents the access level of a user in the system.
4-level role hierarchy for the picturebook platform.

 - ROLE_UNSPECIFIED: Default value, should not be used.
 - ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN: 超级管理员：课题负责人，拥有全部权限
 - ROLE_ADMIN: 普通管理员：课题核心成员，可上传和审核绘本
 - ROLE_TEACHER: 教师用户：可检索、浏览、下载绘本，提交反馈
 - ROLE_PARENT: 家长用户：仅可查看、浏览课题组推送的绘本

v1UpdateUserResponse.description: UpdateUserResponse is the response for UpdateUser.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

updateTime.description: When the user was last updated.
